history.summary: Marked all v0.3, v0.4, v0.5 index tasks ✅ per user confirmation that everything through v0.5 is implemented. Traversal now begins at v0.6.

Normalized field-group validation vocabulary to invalid|validating|disabled (breaking rename of error→invalid), standardized the [data-part=required] marker, bumped manifest to 2.0.0 with a breaking changes entry, and proved the faqir upgrade migration path. 1853 tests green.

faqir-validate.js plugin: bare l-validate reflects native ValidityState + custom l-validate:<name> validators into the field-group contract (data-state=invalid, error part, aria-invalid/describedby); submit gating + on-valid hook + validate-on-submit-then-live policy. 1.26KB gzip, 16 tests.

Added the zero-dependency @faqir-ui/forms scalar renderer with strict JSON Schema/UI schema validation; string, textarea, enum radio/select (four-option threshold), number/integer, boolean checkbox/switch, date-picker, email, and URI mappings; deterministic field-group wiring and required/description propagation. Eleven golden schemas are audit-clean, with Bun, Node, browser-target, typecheck, registry audit, package dry-run, and the full 1891-test suite green.

Added the zero-dependency faqir-persist and faqir-intersect plugins with reactive JSON persistence, private-mode fallback, namespaced magic access, enter/leave/once hooks, teardown cleanup, deterministic faqir bundle --js distribution, and generated context/skill discovery. Both plugins are under 1 KB gzip and the full 1905-test suite is green.

Added the zero-dependency faqir-mask plugin with pure caret-safe 9/a/* masking, paste normalization, masked-display/raw-model binding, teardown cleanup, and optional input-otp integration. The plugin is 1.96 KB gzip and the full 1917-test suite is green.

Added canonical document header/footer parts with native running-element margin boxes, Chromium fixed-position fallbacks, CSS page counters, tokenized print geometry, a three-page audit-clean reference, renderer support metadata, and regression coverage. The full 1928-test suite, typecheck, registry audit, generated checks, and targeted visual snapshot are green.

User-requested out-of-order task: new `faqir bindings vue` command (target-agnostic manifest→IR walker + Vue emitter) generating all 39 primitives as typed Vue 3 components over a 128-line hand-written runtime; typed literal-union props, data-part slot projection, boolean state props; drift guard in bun test + CI check:bindings. Full 2014-test suite green. NOTE: state.current was 0.6-04 (started, unfinished in a prior session) when this session began — 0.6-04 remains ⬜ and is the next pending task in document order.

@faqir-ui/forms composites: nested objects → fieldset cards (recursive), enum arrays → checkbox-group/multi-select on the shared 4-value threshold, arrays of objects → repeatable groups (form-scope l-data + keyed l-for, static+bound row wiring, min/max gates), ui:groups layout groups, and a ui:wizard multi-step stub of the unlanded 0.6-14 pattern (stepper + card panels + per-step faqir-validate gate). All 18 golden schemas audit-clean; §7.2 mapping checklist mirrored in tests; patient-intake e2e (render→validate→submit, zero custom JS) green under happy-dom. Forms now always emit l-data (bare forms were never walked by bootstrap); core scope-root findings filed as follow-up 0.6-15. Deviation: multi-select instead of tag-input (no tag-input in registry).

@faqir-ui/vue recipes + SSR: `faqir bindings vue` now generates all 22 recipes — recipe IR (src/bindings/recipe-ir.ts) parses each manifest reference template into a static render tree (contract attrs + hidden FOUC guards verbatim, l-* stripped, unique parts → named slots, variants → union props on their applied_to part, placeholders → string/boolean props, id via Vue 3.5 useId) and scans controllers for @ui:provides methods + dispatched faqir:* events (cross-recipe imports followed); controllers vendored into packages/vue/src/controllers with rewritten imports under the drift guard. Hand-written recipe-runtime.ts (149 lines): onMounted create / onBeforeUnmount destroy, events re-emitted as Vue events (detail, event), controller API exposed (dialogRef.open()). 30 new tests incl. per-recipe lifecycle/leak spies, SSR renderToString in a zero-DOM subprocess, warning-free hydration for every recipe. Demo SFC (5 recipes + 3 primitives) verified in Chrome against the real CSS bundle; README covers recipes + Inertia/SSR. vue peer bumped to ^3.5.0. 2082 tests green.

Patterns wizard + form-page. `wizard`: fully-declarative multi-step form (stepper + card panels + field-group + buttons) driven by one l-data `{ step }` — :hidden/:data-state bindings for visibility+indicators, @click/submit nav, and faqir-validate's l-validate on-valid hook to advance/block-while-invalid (inactive-step controls :disabled so excluded from validation) and, on the final step, set data-state=submitted + dispatch faqir:wizard-complete. Zero custom JS; verified end-to-end in Chrome (next/back, completed states, gating, completion event detail.steps=2) and by 11 happy-dom tests. `form-page`: the canonical schema-rendered form page, pinned byte-for-byte to @faqir-ui/forms output — shared FORM_PAGE_SCHEMA fixture in cases.ts, pattern HTML generated from it, drift-guarded by packages/forms/tests/form-page-golden.test.ts (generator↔pattern can't diverge). Both manifests validate + document composition; both pages faqir-audit-clean and auto-discovered by the visual/a11y matrix. Regenerated registry-index + faqir-creator skill. 2098 tests green (+16).

note: Pointer file for the /faqir-plan slash command. FAQIR-PLAN.md status cells (⬜/✅) are the source of truth; this file records the cross-session cursor and a per-task log. Do not hand-edit `current` while a session is running.
